id_grants.name: Bantuan Digitalisasi UMKM
id_grants.description: Digitalisation grant for micro and small enterprises — covers e-commerce onboarding, digital payments setup, social media marketing tools, and basic IT equipment.

id_grants.name: UMKM Export Development Grant
id_grants.description: Supports Indonesian SMEs expanding to export markets — trade fair participation, export training, product certification, and international marketing.

id_grants.name: LINK & Match Industry Grant
id_grants.description: Supports SMEs partnering with large industries or research institutions for technology transfer, production upgrades, and industrial innovation projects.

id_grants.name: Halal Certification Grant (BPJPH)
id_grants.description: Subsidises Halal certification costs for food, beverage, and consumer goods SMEs. Covers application fees, lab testing, and certification audit expenses.
id_grants.funding_ratio: Up to 100% of certification costs covered

id_grants.name: BRI Ultra Mikro KUR Financing
id_grants.description: Government-subsidised micro loans for small enterprises — low interest rate (3-6%), minimal collateral, quick approval. For working capital, equipment, or expansion.
id_grants.funding_ratio: Subsidised loan at 3-6% p.a., up to Rp50,000,000

id_grants.name: Kartu Prakerja — Training & Upskilling Grant
id_grants.agency: PMO Kartu Prakerja / Ministry of Manpower
id_grants.description: Individual training voucher for employees and jobseekers. Covers online courses, certification, and provides post-training cash incentives.
id_grants.funding_ratio: Free training + Rp600,000 cash incentive per person
